title: Crystal Kingdom
prompt: Majestic fantasy kingdom with spires built entirely from giant, glowing iridescent crystals. Multiple cascading waterfalls flowing between floating islands, delicate stone bridges connecting them, soft morning sunlight casting rainbows through the mist, intricate architecture, magical and peaceful atmosphere, high fantasy concept art.

title: Forest Guardian
prompt: A gentle forest guardian creature constructed from living ancient wood, vines, moss, and soft glowing wildflowers. Standing peacefully in a sun-dappled woodland clearing, looking down with kind glowing eyes, fantasy realism, incredibly rich and detailed botanical elements, ethereal fantasy illustration.
